latest.title: Fitz Roy's jagged peak is younger than your grandma
latest.script_key: fitz roy s jagged spire looks ancient but it s a baby only 10 million years old see those vertical stripes that s where glaciers scraped away the softer rock leaving the hard stuff standing that s why it looks like a knife s edge ever touch a layer cake and wonder what s inside that s fitz roy

latest.title: Mountains are wearing themselves down faster than you think
latest.script_key: here s the part nobody tells you mountains aren t just standing there getting shorter they re actively melting see those jagged ridges rain and snow soak into cracks dissolve the rock and wash it away that s why alpine valleys are always widening

latest.title: Bears don't just swim for fun at Alaska lakes
latest.script_key: these two bears aren t splashing around they re hunting watch the one on the left it s actually diving that s why they swim so far fish are hiding deeper than you think i love how they time their dives with the lake s ripples what would you do if you had to hunt like that

latest.title: Painted elephants aren't what you think in India
latest.script_key: watch closely at the paint splashes they re not decoration they re camouflage elephants in india get painted to avoid poachers who mistake them for tusked males that s why the bright colors actually blend into the forest did you learn this wrong too

latest.title: Fossils turn old bones into time clues
latest.script_key: fossils can preserve a clue from deep time watch the shape in the rock because fossils form when buried remains leave mineral records behind the original body is gone but the pattern can reveal age habitat and behavior which ancient clue should we read next

latest.title: Storm clouds reveal a storm's heat engine
latest.script_key: storm clouds reveal the cloud spiral first watch closely because warm ocean air rises near the center and releases heat as clouds build rotation organizes that energy into bands from above the storm is not random it is an engine which satellite clue next

latest.title: Forests can cool the air below them
latest.script_key: forests can cool the air below them watch the shade and mist because leaves block direct sun and release water vapor that combination can make the forest floor feel like a different climate the canopy is a cooling machine not just cover which forest layer next

latest.title: Elephants cool blood through giant ears
latest.script_key: elephants use their ears as living radiators watch the ear surface because warm blood flows through those broad veins moving air can dump heat before it spreads through the body that is why the ears are more than decoration in hot places which giant animal trick next

latest.title: Beetles can steer by the Milky Way
latest.script_key: beetles can use the night sky like a compass watch the straight path because some dung beetles use sky patterns to keep from circling back into rivals that celestial shortcut helps a tiny insect roll food away fast would you expect a beetle to use astronomy

latest.title: Magnets make invisible fields visible
latest.script_key: magnets can show a hidden force map watch the filings line up because each tiny piece becomes a small magnet in the field together they trace the direction of the force around the magnet the pattern is physics drawing itself which force next

latest.title: Asian elephants don't forget like we think
latest.script_key: watch the wrinkles on her trunk tip that s her fingerprint unique to her elephants don t just remember paths they remember who helped or hurt them years later that s why they avoid certain people long after a single encounter did you learn this wrong too

latest.title: Mont Veyrier’s invisible glacier engine

latest.title: Montana crater hides boiling water secrets
